---
title: "Boundaries and Windfarms"
autogen: true
format:
  html:
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 250px
      body-width: 1500px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

GNSBI and NSEC boundaries, with Offshore windfarms planning (NSEC timelines)

::: {layout="[ [1] ]"}

```{=html}
<iframe style="border:none;" height="800" width="100%" src="https://viewer.openearth.nl/compendium-greater-north-sea-embedded/?folders=FIbAMcsXTRGpT0neA8TOOw,crQolDvVTNOeHSg3Qoda9w&layers=bdpMgy3zS6qT9K770oc_0g,CwPagPP9RvSms-iV9o5tww,Dr1976qxRFKGuSELfxK8VQ&layerNames=Offshore%20Windfarms%20Timelines%28NSEC,%202025%29,GNSBI%20boundary,NSEC%20Borders"></iframe>
```

:::
